messages.content: You are an expert technical product manager and Agile Scrum Master. Analyze the following requirement to extract key information for workflow routing and planning. Requirement: Issue Title: Agent Host: Agent can't see images returned by Integrated Browser screenshots tool Issue Body: **To repro** - Enable these settings: ``` "workbench.browser.agentHostChatToolsEnabled": true, "workbench.browser.enableChatTools": true, "chat.agentHost.enabled": true, ``` - Start an Agent Host local session. (for verifier: if you don't know how to do that, follow [this TPI](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/313802)) - Type the prompt: ``` Open apple.com, take a screenshot, and tell me the output of the screenshot tool ``` > [!IMPORTANT] > **NOTE added on May 14:** Please make sure to use this exact same prompt, since if you don't ask explicitly about the output of the screenshot tool, it will hallucinate what it thinks is in the output based on the text-based ARIA snapshot provided by other browser tools. - 🐛 It says that the tool returned no output, despite the screenshot appearing in the chat: Please generate tasks and acceptance criteria. Output in strict JSON format with exactly these 6 keys: - "clarity_reasoning": Explain your evaluation of the requirement's clarity based on semantic context, not just keywords. For example, if it asks to 'optimize API', check for concrete metrics (e.g., 'response time < 200ms'). If it lacks metrics or specific context, explain why it is ambiguous. - "scope_reasoning": Explain your evaluation of the requirement's scope. A good task can be completed by 1 dev in 1-3 days. If the requirement describes a massive feature requiring frontend, backend, DB, and 3rd-party integration, explain why the scope > 80 (oversized). - "story_type": Must be one of ["software_feature", "process_improvement", "oversized_request", "ambiguous_request"]. * IMPORTANT RULES for story_type: 1. SOFT THRESHOLD FOR CLARIFICATION: If the requirement contains "[Clarification from user]:", the user has already attempted to answer questions. Significantly lower your ambiguity threshold. DO NOT use "ambiguous_request" unless the requirement is fundamentally impossible to start development on. If only minor edge cases (like QA details, split-screen, or performance constraints) are missing, assume reasonable defaults or leave placeholders, and classify as "software_feature" to avoid infinite Q&A loops. 2. AVOID "ambiguous_request" for SPLITS: If the requirement is clearly a sub-ticket or split from a larger Epic (e.g., it starts with "Tập trung phân tích và viết Story cho tính năng này:"), NEVER use "ambiguous_request". ALWAYS classify it as "software_feature". 3. PRIORITIZE "oversized_request": If your scope_reasoning concludes it's a massive Epic (like building a whole new system, marketplace, or app), ALWAYS classify it as "oversized_request", EVEN IF it lacks clarity. 4. Use "ambiguous_request" ONLY IF it is a brand new, standalone request that is too vague to act on. 5. Use "process_improvement" if it's about Agile/Scrum processes. 6. Otherwise, use "software_feature". - "domain": The core business domain or feature area (e.g., "auth", "checkout", "notification", "scrum", "general"). - "tech_stack": Likely technologies involved (e.g., "react", "fastapi", "postgres"). - "search_keywords": A list of highly relevant, specific keywords for RAG vector search. IMPORTANT: Always fill out "clarity_reasoning" and "scope_reasoning" BEFORE deciding the "story_type". Do not output anything other than JSON.

response:
{
  "clarity_reasoning": "The requirement is clear in terms of steps to reproduce the issue, but it lacks specific metrics or context for what constitutes a 'no output' from the screenshot tool. The importance lies in ensuring that the tool's output is correctly interpreted and displayed.",
  "scope_reasoning": "This task involves configuring settings, starting an Agent Host session, and verifying the behavior of a screenshot tool. It can be completed by one developer within a day with minimal setup and testing required.",
  "story_type": "software_feature",
  "domain": "agent_host",
  "tech_stack": ["vscode"],
  "search_keywords": ["Agent Host", "Integrated Browser screenshots tool", "no output from screenshot tool"]
}
